children.name: This document outlines our product roadmap for 2026. Our focus areas include improving the core user experience, expanding integrations, and building out the analytics platform.
children.characters: This document outlines our product roadmap for 2026. Our focus areas include improving the core user experience, expanding integrations, and building out the analytics platform.

children.name: Important: All dates are tentative and subject to change based on resource allocation and customer feedback.
children.characters: Important: All dates are tentative and subject to change based on resource allocation and customer feedback.

children.name: We are migrating to a microservices architecture using the following stack. The migration is planned in three phases to minimize disruption to the existing user base.
